programmes.show_description: Tá beocht i gCuan Bhaile Átha Cliath le teacht an earraigh. (Spring signals a reawakening for Dublin Bay's ecosystem.)
Cuirtear glaoch ar Tharrtháil Sléibhe Chiarraí faoi bhean a thit ag teacht anuas de na Cruacha Dubha. (Kerry Mountain Rescue get a call out to the Reeks.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Ar an mBaile Riabhach i gCorca Dhuibhne a bheidh Síle. (Síle visits An Baile Riabhach, a townland just west of Dingle in Co. Kerry.)
Babhta leathcheannais Ghlór Tíre 2026 beo! Is féidir do vóta a chaitheamh anois. (The live semifinal of Glór Tíre 2026. Voting is open.)
Leantar cúigear feirmeoirí agus iad ag iarraidh an dúlra agus a slí bheatha a chosaint. (This series follows five farmers as they try to protect wildlife and their living.)
Clár cúrsaí reatha seachtainiúil TG4. Déanfar scagadh agus plé ar scéalta nuachta. (Politics and the economy, regional, national and international affairs.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Is í Tara Breathnach a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Tara Breathnach.)
Tá sé in am folcadh a thógáil! (It's bath time! Time to get clean!)
Is breá leis an triúr seo ceol a sheinm a chéile. (There are 3 little friends and their favourite thing to do is play music instruments together.)
Bíonn spraoi ag na Clódóirí ag déanamh dathanna éagsúla. (The Printing Crew have lots of fun making different colours.)
Bíonn ríméad ar Cory ó tharla go mbeidh sé ag fanacht thar oíche Tigh Thuathail. (Cory is ecstatic to stay over at the O'Tools' house.)
Oíche Shamhna atá ann agus tá na Meicneoirí ag imirt bob nó bia. (The Mechanics go trick or treating on Halloween.)
Beidh Elmo ag foghlaim faoi bholgáin inniu. (Elmo is learning all about bubbles today.)
Tá an-spraoi ag Pip agus Posy ag déanamh hataí amaideacha. Geallann siad go gcaithfidh siad chuig an bpáirc iad. (Pip and Posy have fun making silly hats.)
Tá éad ar Tib agus ar Bobble mar go bhfuil gradam buaite ag Lalloo. (It's Awards' Day in the forest. When Lalloo wins a prize, Bobble and Tib get jealous.)
Tá an Ninja Oíche tar éis meaisín Romeo a ghoid! (Night Ninja has taken Romeo's machine!)
Tá boladh aisteach sa ngairdín agus téann Wussywat á fhiosrú. (Wussywat wants to find out where the stinky smell is coming from so she goes on a sniff chase.)
Tá iarsmalann ag Clifford de na rudaí ar fad a caitheadh amach ar fud an bhaile thar na blianta. (Clifford has set up a museum.)
Foghlaimeoidh na cairde faoi réaltaí agus réaltbhuíonta. (The pups learn about stars and constellations.)
Tá Cíobhaímamat óg sáinnithe ar phíosa sneachta atá ag leá. (A baby Kiwimammathus gets stuck on a small patch of fast-melting snow.)
Caithfidh Hal agus Dot dul ar shiúlóid charthanachta. (Hal and Dot have to go on a charity walk.)
Is aoibhinn le Bean Berg féileacáin agus ba bhreá léi dá mbeidís ina gairdín. (Mrs Berg loves butterflies and wants them to visit her garden.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tugann Lotta féirín do Lola ach ní maith léi ar chor ar bith é. (Lola receives a gift from Lotta that she doesn't like at all.)
Bíonn éad ar Kitt nuair a chabhraíonn Emma le síota atá gortaithe agus ar strae. (Emma helps a lost and wounded Cheetah causing Kitt to get jealous.)
Tugann Pat Caipín chuig an tréidlia mar go bhfuil imní air go bhfuil píosa de phuzal slogtha aige. (Pat has to rush Caipín to the vet, but the Guanos are out looking for trouble.)
Tá duine éigin ag iarraidh an cluiche Wiznamail a scriosadh go deo. (Someone is trying to shut down 'Wiznimals'.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi sheasamh i ndiaidh a chéile i líne  a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about lining up!)
Rachaidh na Blocuimhreacha ar fad i gcomórtas lena chéile ag Railí na mBlocuimhreacha. (Ten riders, ten pedal-powered cars, but only one can lift the trophy.)
Téann Gorm ar aistear beag. (Blue goes on a little adventure.)
Tugann na Trí Bhéar faoin stáitse nuair a bhíonn an banna ceoil tinn. (The Three Bears step in to help when the band are too ill to play in the show.)
Tá mama ar a bealach le cuidiú leis na hioraí iora óg a thabhairt ar an saol. (Mom is on her way to the squirrel family.)
Inniu breithlá Sheáin. Tá borróg bhlasta faighte aige chomh maith le roinnt bronntanas. (Today is Seán's birthday. He eats a tasty bun and gets a few presents.)
Tá Posy ag an gclós súgartha ach níl sí in ann Loscán a fháil in áit ar bith. (Posy is at the playground but can't find Froggy anywhere.)
Clár ealaíne ina ndéanann Máire Treasa ceardaíocht agus ealaín lena cara Scú Scú Scuab. (An exciting art series where Máire Treasa does arts and crafts with Scú Scú Scuab.)
Tá soilse na cathrach ag teacht idir Dot agus na réaltaí. (The lights of the city are coming between Dot and the stars.)
Caithfidh Dot feabhas a chur ar a cuid damhsa don chóisir damhsa. (Dot has to improve her dance moves for the dance party.)
Samhlaíonn Faith-Leigh a saol ina hinnealtóir nuair a bheidh sí mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Faith-Leigh imagines her life as an engineer with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Imríonn Zou, Daideo agus Elzee cluiche folach bíog. (Zou, Grandpa and Elzee play a game of hide and seek.)
An bhfuil ortha ann le cuidiú linn teacht ar eochair Tigh MewMew go sciobtha? (Is there a spell to help our friends find the key to Mewmew's house and fast?)
Beidh muc atá ina peata, toirtís a bhfuil ocras air agus bréagán a thagann chun beatha ar chlár an lae inniu! (We have a pet pig, a hungry tortoise plus a toy comes to life!)
Pádraig Ó Laighin a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín an tseachtain seo. (Pádraig Ó Laighin is this week's guest.)
Éiríonn Hal as a phost agus rún aige a bheith ina ealaíontóir. (Hal quits his job to become an artist.)
Deir an t-údar Dick Cavett go seolfaidh sé chuimhní cinn Sam chuig a fhoilsitheoir. (Author Dick Cavett offers to send Sam's memoirs to his publisher.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (A look back at songs we grew up with.)
Tugann Jessica lámh chúnta do Shirriam in Arizona, nuair is dúnmharú an toradh a bhíonn ar ualach airgid a aimsítear. (Jessica helps a sheriff investigate a murder in Arizona.)
Babhta leathcheannais Ghlór Tíre 2026 beo! Is féidir do vóta a chaitheamh anois. (The live semifinal of Glór Tíre 2026. Voting is open.)

programmes.show_name: Taste of Australia with Hayden Quinn
programmes.show_description: Téann Hayden ag seoltóireacht lena sheanathair i gCalafort Sydney. (Hayden goes sailing with his grandfather on the famous Sydney Harbour.)

Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Tugann an clár faisnéise seo cúrsaí cumhachta, féiniúlachta agus ról na mban san antoisceacha chun solais. (This documentary looks at the role of women in extremism.)
Téann Rudy sa seans ag tús na trialach agus déanann Sarah beart suarach. (As the trial begins, Rudy pulls a risky move, while Sarah goes lower than ever before.)
Tá ceant Survivor ar ais ach ní mar a shíltear a bhítear! (The classic Survivor auction is back with a twist!)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Ar an 14ú lá de mhí Lúnasa 1994 d'fhág Arlene Arkinson a teach chun dul chuig dioscó. Níor aimsíodh a corp riamh. (Arlene Arkinson was last seen on the 14th of August 1994.)
Craoladh ar imeachtaí na maidine de riar na hoibre i nDáil Éireann. (Coverage of today's proceedings in Dáil Éireann.)

Tugtar spléachadh sa tsraith seo ar an díograis a theastaíonn chun seónna talmhaíochta a bhuachan. (This series celebrates the passion needed to be Ireland's 'Best in Show'.)
Téann Séaghan, Louise agus Proinsias go Tangier sa chéad chlár den tsraith nua. (Séaghan, Louise and Proinsias land in Tangier for the first episode of the new series.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Réitíonn Bréidín bricfeasta do Chlúmh ach iontas na n-iontas tá Clúmh lán go béal! (Tweedy learns that there is such a thing as too many treats for the usually hungry Fluff!)
Tabharfaidh na Singalings aghaidh ar an dufair inniu, áit atá lán le plandaí éagsúla. (The Singalings are going to the jungle, where there are lots of different plants.)
Tá leon déanta de phrionsa agus féachann Dora prionsa a dhéanamh de arís. (Dora tries to break a spell and turn a lion back into a prince.)
Tá Abby agus Rudy ag foghlaim faoi spásairí agus an obair a dhéanann siad. (Abby and Rudy learn all about astronauts and what they do.)
Tagann Pip agus Posy ar bhalún agus tugann siad Bob air. Bíonn an-spraoi acu nó go bpléascann siad Bob! (Pip and Posy find a balloon and call it Bob.)
Ní maith le Deeno bosca ceoil Norbet. (Deeno is tired of Norbet's squeezy-box so the Olobobs create Soupy Sound.)
Ceapann Romeo róbaitín atá sé in ann a smachtú le cianrialtán. (Romeo creates a little robot that he controls with a remote control.)
Tá Wussywat ag súil go mór leis an gcóisir ach níl foighne ar bith aici! (Wussywat wants to make a party happen sooner.)
Nuair a thagann Zou ar bhata Dhaideo sa gharáiste, téann sé féin agus a chuid chairde go dtí an trá le dul ag imirt cruicéid. (Zou discovers Grandpa's old bat in the garage.)
Tá plean iontach ag Ricky agus a chairde chun na daoine a fásta a choinneáil gnóthach. (Ricky and his friends come up with a great plan that will keep the grown ups busy.)
Tá fail ar cheann de na Piseanna-Rex agus tá Ginger agus an chuid eile ag iarraidh fáil réidh leo. (One of the baby Pea-Rexes gets the hiccups.)
Caithfidh Dot agus a cuid cairde róbat rásaíochta a dhéanamh. (Dot and her friends have to build a racing robot.)
Caithfidh tallann speisialta a bheith agat má tá tú ag iarraidh a bheith i do bhall de chlub Ella. (You need to have a special talent to join Ella's club.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá Lola ag iarraidh damhsa nua a fhoghlaim. (Lola tries to find a dance that suits her.)
Tá Pinocchio agus a chairde ag iarraidh Paulo a shábháil. (Violet Riding Hood wants to send all the wolves to the Great North, but Pinocchio and his friends want to save Paulo.)
Cuireann na Guanos ceapaire gránna in áit cheapaire blasta Lola. (Lola thinks Victor has played a prank on her, but it's up to Pat to prove that the Guanos are to blame.)
Caithfidh Angelo dul ag obair faoi rún mar Maor Pasáiste. (Caithfidh Angelo dul ag obair faoi rún mar Maor Pasáiste.)

Amhrán spraíúil faoi Mary agus a cangarú a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about Mary who had a Kangaroo.)
Faigheann Cúig cuireadh chuig cóisir ach ní féidir léi dul ann gan a cuid cairde ar fad! (Five and friends go missing from the five-star ball.)
Éiríonn le Buí go leor a dhathú. (Yellow has fun with all the new things he has coloured in.)
Tá Gabh agus Stop ag iarraidh cóisir mhór a eagrú do Bhó. (How can Go and Stop organise a huge party for Cow?)
Beidh an coimeádaí zú John ag tabhairt aire do na pandaí rua inniu. (John the zookeeper introduces us to the adorable red panda.)
Is í Posy an Rí i gcluiche ach ní fada go dtéann an chumhacht sa gcloigeann uirthi. (Posy starts a game where she is King and Pip is her subject and the power goes to her head.)
Briseann Ribín druma Dhris trí thimpiste. (Ribín breaks Dris' drum by accident.)
Amhrán faoi mhadra ar strae a bheidh le cumadh ag Scoil Phádraig i nGaoth Dobhair. (On this episode Scoil Phádraig in Gaoth Dobhair write a song about a dog gone astray.)
Tá George le líomanáid a dhíol le hairgead a dhéanamh. (George decides to set up his own lemonade stand.)
Samhlaíonn Ruarc a shaol ina aisteoir nuair a bheidh sé mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Ruarc imagines his life as an actor when he grows up, with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Tá comórtas ar an trá inniu don chaisleán is fearr ach meas tú cé a bhuafaidh? (Zou and the gang have a sandcastle competition at the beach today, but who will win?)
Béar bán ag damhsa, firéad ag spraoi sa sneachta & madra atá in amhras faoi shicín rubair a bheidh ar an gclár seo. (A dancing polar bear & a ferret celebrates its first snow day.)
Cáit Uí Chofaigh as Ciarraí a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín ar an gclár. (Cáit Uí Chofaigh from Kerry joins Máirtín in this week¿s programme.)
Téann Francis chuig Mardi Gras ach nach dtagann tinneas boilg air. (Francis goes to Mardi Gras but gets food poisoning.)

Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (A look back at songs we grew up with. Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Bíonn faitíos ar Jessica nuair a sháinnítear i ndoinsiún Chaisleán Ballynook í. (Jessica's vacation turns terrifying when she lands her in the dungeon of Ballynook Castle.)
